items.value: Reduces the amount of time squished by 20% of the original time.

Increases the value of the sticker to the right by two.
Can be chained with other Boost Next stickers.
This sticker will transform into a random sticker when applied.
Adds an 8% chance that a used item will remain in the inventory.

Reduces the size of the map by 9%. Must be applied before exploring
a level for the first time in a run to take effect.
Cannot be removed if the current level has already been generated.

Adds an extra locked room to the level. Must be applied before exploring
a level for the first time in a run to take effect.
Cannot be removed if the current level has already been generated.
Every time YTPs are earned, 1 second of invisibility is given for each 15 YTPs.

Adds 3 vents to the level. Must be applied before exploring
a level for the first time in a run to take effect.
Cannot be removed if the current level has already been generated.

Adds 10 pizzas to the map. 
Eating a pizza takes 6 seconds, refills stamina, and rewards 100 YTPs.
Must be applied before exploring
a level for the first time in a run to take effect.
Cannot be removed if the current level has already been generated.

Instead of praising,
time will slow down for the amount of time Baldi would've praised for.
Each sticker increases the slowdown.
(50%,25%,12.5%,6%)
Adds a 10% chance that a used up item will become a Quarter.
Each sticker will add 1 extra detention before the detention length increases.
Each sticker reduces the time of every random event by 10%.

NPCs that you look at will be slowed down.
Each sticker adds 8% to the speed reduction.
The strength of all push forces and speed reductions are reduced by 10%.

Daredevil Sticker Pack
Contains 3 rarer stickers, with a chance to give dangerous stickers you do not want...

Reduces Max Stamina by 30%.
Cannot be replaced once applied.
Will disappear even on glue.

Reduces all earned You Thought Points by 30%.
Cannot be replaced once applied.
Will disappear even on glue.

Increases Baldi's anger by 25%.
Cannot be replaced once applied.
Will disappear even on glue.

Adds a black fog that starts 8 tiles ahead.
Each sticker brings the fog closer 1.5 tiles.
Cannot be replaced once applied.
Will disappear even on glue.

Slows down the player by 12.5% for every sticker of this type in the inventory.
Applying does nothing but remove this sticker leaving the sticker applied on intact.

Does nothing.
Cannot be replaced once applied.
Will disappear even on glue.

Subtracts 100 YTPs per item used.
Cannot be replaced once applied.
Will disappear even on glue.
